message:
test(ftui): add resilience/chaos validation suite (FTUI-08.4)

Session lifecycle chaos tests (12):
- FailableSession mock with configurable error injection at
  suspend/resume/draw lifecycle points
- Rapid lifecycle cycling (100 rounds), suspend/resume (200 cycles)
- Failure injection: suspend/resume/draw failures preserve valid state
- Guard cleanup after injected failures, panic during recovery
- Interleaved draw/poll/suspend/resume stress
- All screen modes lifecycle stress, sequential guard creation stress

Output gate resilience tests (5):
- Rapid phase cycling (1000 rounds)
- Concurrent reads from background thread during phase transitions
- Writer suppression invariant under cycling (200 rounds)
- Gated write functions across transitions (100 rounds)
- Phase idempotency (300 repeated sets)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
